CHECKPOINT_PENDING: structural blocker — WorkloadSpec::Job(JobSpec) shape (parser-side, no replicas/no WorkloadDriver) is incompatible with Job/JobV1 (intent-side, NonZeroU32 replicas + WorkloadDriver enum). Naive WorkloadSpec::Job(JobSpec) projection from Job loses validated replicas field; handlers.rs:714 alloc_status reads job.replicas.get() as replicas_desired. Step framing 'behaviour preserved' cannot hold with lossy projection. Surfaced CLARIFICATION_NEEDED to user with 3 resolution options (A: widen WorkloadSpec::Job to carry JobV1; B: introduce separate intent-side WorkloadIntent enum; C: merge 02-03a+02-03b). Cannot proceed autonomously per boundary rules ('DO NOT autonomously decide and ship'). Awaiting user decision.
